creator: benny.goemans@gmail.com
text:
To be fair I hadn't checked the patch, really. I'm glad you asked just so I could verify. Checked the CMakeLists.txt: fonts are installed without checking any options (Blender 3). Built with poudriere and installed, no problems. Fonts are installed as expected, with NLS=OFF.

In order to make up for it, I am testing the LTS versions 28 & 29 as well without NLS but fixed pkg-plist. Building as we speak :)
